start: ^ADMIN Personel: Hey! Are you new here on campus?
continue_1: ^You: Yeah, still trying to learn where everything is.
continue_2: ^ADMIN Personel: No worries! Let me introduce you to this building.
continue_4: ^ADMIN Personel: This is the Administration Building. You can handle your COR, documents, and enrollment concerns here.
continue_5: ^ADMIN Personel: Oh, that's good to know. I might need to visit soon.
continue_6: ^ADMIN Personel: Definitely! If you ever get lost, just ask around.
